subject: ENGLISH
title: Use own words in retelling myths, legends,
objective: Use own words in retelling myths, legends, fables, and narrative
introduction: Welcome, Word Explorer! 🌟 Today's mission: master new sight words. The more sight words you know, the faster and easier reading becomes. Let's begin!
